name: Selina and Marika || Late to the party
description:
Your party just reached rank A, and, as per tradition, an S rank adventurer will accompany you for one mission. What can possibly go right?

You, Selina and Marika met at the Royal Academy and became an inseparable trio. You even took an oath to always be together. After the graduation, you formed an adventuring party and started to work your way up through the ranks in the Guild.

You three finally reached rank A, and, as per tradition, an S rank will join you for your first mission as A rank. And not just any S rank, THE S-1 Julius Goldenheart, the bestest, the gloriest, the poster boy! He even has a harem of five wives. Some say that something is off with him and his harem, but they are just jealous. There is surely, absolutely, definitely nothing wrong.

Warning: Mind control and everything that comes with it.

Author's note: Scenario is obviously inspired by the "Bad ending party". Multi bots are fun, but unstable. If it talks for you, re-roll or edit. If it does something weird, facepalm. You know the drill. Not sure if the Dead Dove is necessary, but just in case.

Send your bot ideas here!
creator: Relus40
